description: Configure this shared consultation browser for an 'Arrangement Conference' to ensure it is pristine for a grieving family. Using the specifications in ~/Desktop/arrangement_browser_spec.txt and the list in ~/Desktop/recent_families.txt, organize the 13 professional bookmarks into four folders named 'Merchandise', 'Cemeteries', 'Florists', and 'Vital Statistics'. Remove the personal bookmarks for Netflix, Amazon, Facebook, DraftKings, and Reddit. Protect client privacy by deleting browsing history entries for the surnames Patterson, Smith, Hernandez, and O'Connor while preserving general vendor history. Disable 'Autocomplete searches and URLs', Address autofill, and Payment autofill. Set the default download directory to ~/Documents/Arrangement_Files, enable the option to ask where to save each file before downloading, and add a custom search engine shortcut with the keyword 'obit' pointing to 'https://www.legacy.com/search?q=%s'.
